name: " You Bring the Macaroni Salad," Macaroni Salad
directions: NOTE: The measurements on the miracle whip, mayonnaise, pickle juice and sugar can be adjusted to your taste.
Honestly, I never measure "exactly.".
Also, use as much or as little cheese as you would like.
Cook macaroni according to directions.
When draining, run cold water over to keep it from sticking together and to "chill" it.
Mix mayonnaise, miracle whip, onion, pickle juice and sugar together to make "sauce.".
After macaroni is completely drained, mix macaroni, "sauce", eggs and cheese until everything is coated and mixed well.
The longer it chills, the better it gets!

similar.name: Tasty Jumbo Pasta Shells With Spinach and Cheese

name: Allison's Creamy Veggie Pasta Salad
directions: cook pasta as directed on box.
Combine other ingredients except for vegetables and cheese in a separate bowl.
When pasta is done, combine mixture with pasta.
Toss in cheese and vegetables.
Chill for at least 3 hours (or overnight if possible).

similar.name: Tasty Jumbo Pasta Shells With Spinach and Cheese
" You Bring the Macaroni Salad," Macaroni Salad
Spinach Shells With Salmon Parmesan Tomato and Basil

name: Rotini Salad
directions: Drain kidney beans and place in a small bowl, cover with vinegar and let set for 1 hour, drain.
Cook rotini and drain.
In large bowl, combine first 8 ingredients.
Combine salad dressing, half and half, sugar and mustard, mixing well.
Pour over rotini mixture, mixing lightly.
Chill before serving.

similar.name: " You Bring the Macaroni Salad," Macaroni Salad

name: Curried Pasta Salad
directions: Cook and drain pasta according to package directions.
Pour into a large bowl (see note) and toss with vinagrette dressing.
Add apple, cucumber and onion and mix well.
Combine mayonnaise, sour cream and curry powder in a small bowl.
Add to other ingredients and mix gently to combine.
Cover and refrigerate several hours to chill and blend flavors.
To serve, line a glass salad bowl with lettuce and spoon salad on top.
I like to garnish with a sprinkle of paprika.
*Note:if you mix in a plastic bowl, the curry powder may stain it.

similar.name: " You Bring the Macaroni Salad," Macaroni Salad

name: Amish Macaroni Salad
directions: Cook macaroni as directed on package; Drain& cool.
In a bowl, whisk together the dressing ingredients so they are well-combined and smooth.
In a large bowl, gently combine the macaroni, celery, carrots, onions, and remaining eggs.
Fold the dressing gently into the macaroni salad mixture.
Place into your serving bowl and garnish with the reserved slice egg and paprika.
Let sit overnight for the best results.
NOTE: It was not in the original recipe, but I sometimes add 1/4 to 1/2 cup chopped green pepper if I have it around.

similar.name: " You Bring the Macaroni Salad," Macaroni Salad

name: Tasty Jumbo Pasta Shells With Spinach and Cheese
directions: Cook shells according to box instructions to el dente.

In large saucepan, heat oil and cook onion and dill for 3-4 minutes.  Add spinach.  Cook until warm and drain any residual juice.  Add salt, pepper, ricotta cheese, parmesan cheese and the beaten egg.
Fill pasta shells with the spinach and cheese mixture.
Spray a 9x13 casserole dish with PAM.  Pour half the pasta sauce on the bottom of the dish.
Add the filled pasta shells and top with remaining pasta sauce.
Cover dish and bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.  Enjoy!

similar.name: Spinach Shells With Salmon Parmesan Tomato and Basil
Shells With Shrimp and Green Beans in Garlic Oil

name: Meatless Stuffed Shells
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F  Spray a 9 x 7 inch glass dish with cooking spray and set aside.
Cook the pasta shells according to package directions.

While the pasta is cooking, make the sauce: saute the garlic in olive oil in a medium saucepan; add all additional sauce ingredients and bring to a simmer; cook on low heat, stirring occasionally, until ready to assemble the shells.
Stir together all filling ingredients until well combined.
Drain the cooked pasta shells.  Pour about 1/4 of the sauce in the bottom of the glass baking dish; fill each pasta shell with cheese filling, dividing evenly among the 12 shells.
Arrange shells in the baking dish and pour the remaining sauce over the top; sprinkle with parmesan cheese and oregano.
Cover with foil and bake for about 50 minutes; uncover and bake for another 5-10 minutes, or until parmesan cheese is lightly browned.
Cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.

similar.name: Tasty Jumbo Pasta Shells With Spinach and Cheese
Shells With Shrimp and Green Beans in Garlic Oil
Spinach Shells With Salmon Parmesan Tomato and Basil

name: Shells With Shrimp and Green Beans in Garlic Oil
directions: Heat the olive oil in a medium skillet; stir in garlic and red pepper; sauté over low heat for 1 minute.
Raise heat to high; immediately add the shrimp.
Saute, stirring constantly, until they become pink, about 3 minutes.
Stir in sun-dried tomatoes and parsley. Remove from heat.
Cook the shells and beans together in plenty of boiling salted water until they are tender, about 12 minutes. Drain.
Toss shrimp mixture, shells and beans together. Serve.

similar.name: Spinach Shells With Salmon Parmesan Tomato and Basil
Tasty Jumbo Pasta Shells With Spinach and Cheese

name: Spinach Shells With Salmon Parmesan Tomato and Basil
directions: Heat butter in a medium skillet; add onion; sauté 5 minutes.
Add garlic; sauté 1 minute. Sir in tomatoes; simmer for 5 minutes.
Add salmon, basil and black pepper to taste.
Meanwhile cook pasta in plenty of boiling salted water until al dente. Drain.
Toss with the salmon sauce. Serve.

similar.name: Tasty Jumbo Pasta Shells With Spinach and Cheese
Shells With Shrimp and Green Beans in Garlic Oil

name: Easy Seashell Krab Salad
directions: Cook shell macaroni according to package; drain.  Rinse with cold water and drain again.
Place cooled, drained pasta in a large bowl.
To bowl, add the onions, shredded cabbage and toss together.
Add mayonnaise (start with the lower amount), salt, pepper, garlic powder, curry powder and/or paprika.
Gently mix everything together.
Chill until ready to serve.

similar.name: Spinach Shells With Salmon Parmesan Tomato and Basil
Tasty Jumbo Pasta Shells With Spinach and Cheese
Shells With Shrimp and Green Beans in Garlic Oil

name: Polynesian Shrimp Salad
directions: Drain the pineapple, reserving 3/4 cup juice and set pineapple aside.
In a small saucepan, combine the cornstarch, curry powder, salt, pepper, and reserved pineapple juice until smooth.
Bring to a boil and cook and stir 1 minute or until thickened.
Remove from the heat and cool to room temperature.
Stir in mayonnaise and sour cream.
In a large bowl, combine the shrimp, pasta, water chestnuts, and reserved pineapple.
Add dressing and toss to coat.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.

similar.name: Shells With Shrimp and Green Beans in Garlic Oil
